intro: Chaotic Party Action with Dark Witch Characters!
description:
Jump into a party game for up to 4 players, starring characters from
The Legend of Dark Witch Episode 4!
Play locally and compete in 6 fast-paced mini-games,
where magic isn’t just for winning — it’s for messing with your friends.

-Magic Changes Everything
Each character can use unique magic to interrupt, trap, or turn the tide at the worst possible moment.
Winning isn’t just about skill —
it’s about timing your magic and causing chaos.

-Familiar Faces, New Battles
Fan-favorite characters return in a completely new party game format.
Easy to pick up, hard to master — and always unpredictable.

-6 Different Mini-Games
Every game has its own rules, pace, and strategy.
Short rounds, quick rematches, and nonstop laughs.

-Perfect for Friends & Family
-Up to 4 players
-Simple controls
-Friendly rivalry guaranteed
